name: Solid Cash Advance
description_short: Solid Cash Advance offers bad credit personal loans with fast applications in St. Paul, MN. Extended hours (7 AM–9 PM daily) and same-day processing for emergency borrowing needs.
description_long: Solid Cash Advance is a loan service provider located at 1951 University Ave W in St. Paul, Minnesota 55104. The company operates under the emergency-cash category, offering financial solutions to consumers who need quick access to funds, particularly those with poor credit histories. The business maintains extended operating hours (7 AM to 9 PM, seven days a week), suggesting accessibility for working-class customers. According to their EZlocal listing, Solid Cash Advance specializes in bad credit loan services and claims to serve borrowers across all credit types. Their stated positioning emphasizes speed and ease of application, inviting customers to apply for personal loans with minimal friction. The company markets itself as accommodating applicants who may have been rejected by traditional lenders due to credit issues. Their service categories include personal loans, car title loans, personal finance, and general financing services. Contact information provided includes a phone line (651-390-1711) and email (service@solidcadvance.com), along with their website solidcadvance.com. However, the company has zero reviews on EZlocal at the time this profile was created, limiting independent verification of service quality or customer satisfaction. No specific information about loan amounts, terms, interest rates, fees, or approval timelines is available from the provided website content. The business appears to be a regional operator rather than a national lender, with a physical office presence in St. Paul. No BBB accreditation status, licensing information, or regulatory complaints are documented in the available data. Marketing materials focus on accessibility to bad-credit borrowers rather than detailed loan product specifications.
address: 1951 University Ave W, St Paul, MN 55104

pros: Extended operating hours (7 AM–9 PM, 7 days/week) provide accessibility for working customers
Explicitly serves borrowers with bad credit and all credit types
Fast and easy application process (claims stated on website)
Offers multiple loan product types (personal loans, car title loans)
Local physical office in St. Paul with direct phone contact
Multiple contact methods available (phone, email, website)
cons: Zero customer reviews on EZlocal limits ability to verify service quality or legitimacy
No specific information disclosed about loan amounts, terms, APR, or fees
No documented BBB accreditation, licensing details, or regulatory oversight information
Unclear approval timeline despite 'fast' marketing claims
Car title loans may require collateral, creating repossession risk for borrowers
best_for: St. Paul residents with bad credit needing emergency funds ($100–$1K range)
Workers needing quick cash approval outside traditional business hours
Borrowers with car equity who can use title loans as collateral
diagnosis: Solid Cash Advance targets borrowers with poor credit in the St. Paul area seeking emergency cash with flexible credit requirements. Main caveat: zero independent reviews and no disclosed APR/fee information make it impossible to verify competitive rates or service quality; prospective borrowers should compare terms against other lenders and verify licensing before applying.
services: Same-day or expedited funding (implied by 'fast' claims)
